title: Quran, Sura 81: At-Takwir
description: Sura 81 (At-Takwir: The Overthrowing) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 81 (At-Takwir: The Overthrowing) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: When the sun is wrapped up, and when the stars fall, and when the mountains are removed, and when full-term she-camels are neglected.
